report.title: Enterprise & Frontier AGI/ASI Governance Architecture (2026–2030)
report.abstract: Establishing the homeostatic operating model for G-SIFIs, featuring the 'Closing Charge', Regulator Submission Pack (RSP), and Kill-Switch Validation Protocol (KSVP) for terminal organization alignment.
report.content:
# 1. Enterprise & Frontier Governance (2026–2030)
## 1.1 The 'Closing Charge' & RSP The **Closing Charge** is the final transition of an enterprise to full homeostatic oversight. This is validated by the **Regulator Submission Pack (RSP)**, which includes: - **Article 11/14 Evidence**: Automated conformity dossiers for the EU AI Office. - **Fiduciary Traceability**: Mapping RAG provenance to Basel III capital adequacy.
## 1.2 Kill-Switch Validation Protocol (KSVP) The KSVP requires physical verification of GPU power-rail severance via BMC/IPMI to mitigate **Deceptive Alignment** (SEV-0) risks that bypass software controls.
## 1.3 Systemic AI Risk Simulation Playbook - **Scenario: 'AGI-TRADER-PROD-01'**: Simulated multi-agent collusion in high-frequency trading environments. - **Resolution**: Deployment of 'Jurisdictional Sidecars' to enforce emergency treaty-aligned reasoning protocols.

report.title: Global Interoperability, Treaties, and Coalition Activation
report.abstract: Specifying the Global AI Governance Operating Model (G-AGOM), the Treaty Alignment Framework (ITAF), and the Coalition Activation Playbook for planetary safety coordination.
report.content:
# 2. Global Interoperability & Multi-Lateral Safety
## 2.1 Treaty Alignment Framework (ITAF) The ITAF operationalizes **Treaty-as-Code (TaC)**, ensuring agentic swarms automatically adapt their safety profiles based on jurisdictional markers in the **EAIP (Enterprise AI Interoperability Protocol)** header.
## 2.2 Global AI Governance Operating Model (G-AGOM) The G-AGOM establishes a **Global Pilot Deployment Roadmap** for coordinating AGI releases across G20 nations.
## 2.3 Coalition Activation & Continuity Codex The **Coalition Activation Playbook** triggers the **Global Governance Continuity Codex (GGCC)** during systemic escapement events, establishing air-gapped communication between planetary safety nodes.

report.title: Civilizational AI Governance Constitution & Covenant Codex
report.abstract: Foundational instruments for planetary intelligence, including the Civilizational Constitution, Covenant Codex Canon, and the Performance Protocol for long-term alignment.
report.content:
# 3. Civilizational Foundations
## 3.1 Civilizational AI Governance Constitution The Constitution establishes the **Foundational Charter** and the **Civilizational Governance Doctrine**, mandating Human Supremacy and Existential Transparency.
## 3.2 Ceremonial Ratification & Performance - **Ratification Ceremony Playbook**: Coordinated global activation of the "Covenanted AI Era." - **Covenant Inscription**: Hard-wiring the **Codex Canon** into foundational models. - **Performance Protocol**: Annual "State of the Covenant" formal verification proofs.
## 3.3 Institutional Adoption Playbook Guides for financial institutions and regulators to align internal bylaws with the Civilizational Covenant.

report.title: Global Renewal Atlas & Governance Metabolism (2050+)
report.abstract: Multi-decade stewardship of planetary intelligence via the Renewal Atlas, Renewal Charter, and a self-correcting governance metabolism model.
report.content:
# 4. Planetary Stewardship & Evolution
## 4.1 Global Renewal Atlas The Atlas is the technical architecture (distributed Sentinel v3.0 nodes) managing the **Renewal Charter** and its first-cycle implementation lifecycle.
## 4.2 Governance Metabolism & Decision-Discipline - **Metabolism Model**: Balancing Fast-Loop (Hardware Kill) with Slow-Loop (Policy Renewal). - **Decision-Discipline under Uncertainty**: Utilizing formal verification of probabilistic kernels as systems exceed human interpretability. - **Self-Correcting Governance**: Automated reversion to "Safe Attractor" states during partial compliance or alignment drift.
## 4.3 The Terminal Governance Attractor The architectural end-state where **Memory** (WORM audit), **Meaning** (Covenant), **Action** (Containment), and **Legitimacy** (ICGC) are perfectly aligned in a stable terminal closure.
